metadata.Plot: Doruk is the only child of a wealthy family, who enters the police academy he dreams of and graduates with first place. He fall in love with Serap whom he met during an operation and get married. But after a while after their daughters Zeynep's birth, Serap leaves the house. Doruk who is a police officer of the special operations, while trying to fulfill the difficult task successfully, on the one hand, his daughter Zeynep both motherhood and father. Serap comes out again and everything changes. The father and daughter started a difficult period in their lives.
metadata.Actors: Cemal Hünal, Irem Helvacioglu, Gizem Hatipoglu
